actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The guard makes two attacks, using Javelin or Longsword in any combination.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Slashing damage.

tactical_info.environment: Commanding guard posts, leading patrols, fortress defense, protecting important locations
tactical_info.tactics: Uses multiattack for versatility, javelins for ranged engagement, longsword for melee, coordinates subordinates
tactical_info.weaknesses: May prioritize protecting others over tactical advantage, bound by duty and honor codes
